Class GLShaderProgram

java.lang.Object
net.fokinatorr.sparkle.graphics.impl.gl.shader.GLShaderProgram
All Implemented Interfaces:
AutoCloseable, NonThrowingAutoCloseable
public class GLShaderProgram extends Object implements NonThrowingAutoCloseable
An OpenGL shader program wrapper. Not thread-safe.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    GLShaderProgram(int programId)
    Creates a GLShaderProgram from an initialized shader program.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    close()
    This method is not expected to throw any checked exceptions.

    Compiles the given GLSL sources into a new shader program.
    static GLShaderProgram

    Creates a shader program from already-compiled shaders.
    GLShaderProgram
    setUniform(String name, float value)
    Updates uniform variable for this program with the specified floating-point value.
    GLShaderProgram
    setUniform(String name, float x, float y)
    Updates uniform variable for this program with the specified floating-point 2D vector components.
    GLShaderProgram
    setUniform(String name, float x, float y, float z, float w)
    Updates uniform variable for this program with the specified floating-point 4D vector components.
    GLShaderProgram
    setUniform(String name, int value)
    Updates uniform variable for this program with the specified integer value.
    GLShaderProgram
    setUniform(String name, org.joml.Matrix4fc matrix)
    Updates uniform variable for this program with the specified 4x4 floating-point matrix.
    void
    unuse(boolean onlyIfCurrent)
    Stops using this program in current context.
    void
    use()
    Starts using this program in current context.

  • Constructor Details

    • GLShaderProgram

      public GLShaderProgram(int programId)
      Creates a GLShaderProgram from an initialized shader program.
      Parameters:
      programId - the program ID
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if program ID is invalid

  • Method Details

    • compile

      public static GLShaderProgram compile(Map<? extends ShaderType, ? extends CharSequence> shadersGLSL)
      Compiles the given GLSL sources into a new shader program.
      Parameters:
      shadersGLSL - the shader sources
      Returns:
      a new GLShaderProgram of compiled shaders
      Throws:
      ShaderCompileException - if compilation of any source fails
      ShaderProgramLinkException - if program linkage fails
      NullPointerException - if any key or value in map is null

    • ofCompiled

      public static GLShaderProgram ofCompiled(it.unimi.dsi.fastutil.ints.IntList shaderIDs)
      Creates a shader program from already-compiled shaders.

      This method does not delete the shaders after linking; do so manually if they won't be used again.

      Parameters:
      shaderIDs - the shader IDs
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if any shader ID is invalid
      ShaderProgramLinkException - if program linkage fails

    • use

      public void use()
      Starts using this program in current context.
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - if this program is closed

    • unuse

      public void unuse(boolean onlyIfCurrent)
      Stops using this program in current context.
      Parameters:
      onlyIfCurrent - if true, will only stop usage when this program is currently active
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - if onlyIfCurrent == true and this program is closed

    • setUniform

      public GLShaderProgram setUniform(String name, int value)
      Updates uniform variable for this program with the specified integer value.
      Parameters:
      name - the variable name
      value - the value
      Returns:
      this program

    • setUniform

      public GLShaderProgram setUniform(String name, float value)
      Updates uniform variable for this program with the specified floating-point value.
      Parameters:
      name - the variable name
      value - the value
      Returns:
      this program

    • setUniform

      public GLShaderProgram setUniform(String name, float x, float y)
      Updates uniform variable for this program with the specified floating-point 2D vector components.
      Parameters:
      name - the variable name
      x - the first component
      y - the second component
      Returns:
      this program

    • setUniform

      public GLShaderProgram setUniform(String name, float x, float y, float z, float w)
      Updates uniform variable for this program with the specified floating-point 4D vector components.
      Parameters:
      name - the variable name
      x - the first component
      y - the second component
      z - the third component
      w - the fourth component
      Returns:
      this program

    • setUniform

      public GLShaderProgram setUniform(String name, org.joml.Matrix4fc matrix)
      Updates uniform variable for this program with the specified 4x4 floating-point matrix.
      Parameters:
      name - the variable name
      matrix - the matrix
      Returns:
      this program

    • close

      public void close()
      This method is not expected to throw any checked exceptions. After calling this method, the instance should no longer be used. Idempotent: calling this method more than once has no effect.
      Specified by:
      close in interface AutoCloseable
      Specified by:
      close in interface NonThrowingAutoCloseable
